title: shureee's Block Icons
description: Icons for Waxed and Infested Blocks to facilitate differentiating
body:
# Description
This resource pack adds icons for waxed and infested blocks to the player's inventory. The badges do not appear outside of it!

# Features
- Waxed copper blocks and items get a waxed star/particle
- Infested stone blocks display with a silverfish icon
- Trapped Chest has a Redstone dust icon

![Block Icons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GRRtRo33/images/1db0eda4b137f772d08a1a9b030d851f4f4c4556.png)

# Questions or Issues?
### Join my Discord!

[shureee's Codebase](https://discord.gg/79NavNqMrv)
